caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, large headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" and "T" printed in gold letters sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone attached to a black boom arm. To his left is a white backdrop featuring the "UNICORN HUSTLE" logo and five stars. Behind him, a screen displays the text "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table in front of him sits a black mug with red text that reads "BOSS TALK OUT". A small circular logo with the text "Boss Talk" is overlaid on the bottom left of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and speaks, his mouth opening and closing as he looks slightly to the side, while the background and equipment remain static.
